output-exprs.el: eventParticipants:/*eventParticipants*/ #"_a-0000ee09-79c9-8000-9bf0-011c48011c48_1479689"( eventId: pv!event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/8eedcd4f-41f4-4085-889b-efedecf448e2"], inmates: pv!inmateIds, participantIds: pv!participantIds )

a:acp.name: expression
a:acp.a:expr: =and( or( a!isNullOrEmpty(pv!participantIds), pv!participantIds = 0 ), or( a!isNullOrEmpty(pv!inmateIds), pv!inmateIds = 0 ))

output-exprs.el:
event[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:fa952da3-a305-45ce-924b-89ca2dab3222/d08885b1-046b-446d-9bc9-86441cb51aa1"]:/*Event Status = Ereignis ist in Bearbeitung durch AL..*/
#"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1624640"

uiExpressionForm.expression: /*41707069616E-GEN*/#"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1536957"( event: ac!event, inmateIds: ac!inmateIds, documents: ac!documents, participantIds: ac!participantIds, eventOpinions: ac!eventOpinions, rework: ac!rework, attachmentIdsToDelete: ac!attachmentIdsToDelete )
